news.t: German Stocks Have Been Flying. What to Do Now.
The stock market after-party is in Europe
In a Record European Earnings Season, Why Is the Share Price Reaction Falling Flat?
Eurozone driven into double-dip recession as Covid takes toll
Europe slips into technical recession in first quarter, as lockdowns took toll

holdings.infoBox: IEUS is an equity ETF with a total of 863 individual holdings. The top holdings are Diploma stock at 0.79%, Beazley at 0.62%, IMI plc at 0.58%, Accelleron Industries AG at 0.56%, and Gaztransport & Technigaz at 0.55%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Europe Small-Cap ETF (IEUS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Europe Small Cap index, a market-cap-weighted index of companies in developed countries of Europe. IEUS was launched on Nov 12, 2007 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: German Stocks Have Been Flying. What to Do Now.
data.text: A continent-wide defense bump, didn't exactly catch the market by surprise, but markets could keep running.

data.title: The stock market after-party is in Europe
data.text: US stock indices remain in record territory. But in recent weeks, they've been stuck in a holding pattern as investors hunt for the next big catalyst that could send shares higher.

data.title: In a Record European Earnings Season, Why Is the Share Price Reaction Falling Flat?
data.text: European companies are beating earnings expectations at a record rate in the first quarter, but the share price reaction has been negatively skewed, Morgan Stanley strategists noted.

data.title: Eurozone driven into double-dip recession as Covid takes toll
data.text: GDP in the 19 economies sharing the euro shrank by 0.6% between January and March

data.title: Europe slips into technical recession in first quarter, as lockdowns took toll
data.text: The European economy shrank again in the first three months of the year, entering an expected technical recession after having shrank in the last quarter of 2020.

data.title: Europe Still Offers Cyclicality at a Discount: JPM's Peters
data.text: Apr.19 -- Grace Peters, EMEA head of investment strategy at JPMorgan Private Bank, discusses investing in European equities. She speaks with Francine Lacqua on “Bloomberg Surveillance Early Edition.

data.title: Japanese, European Equities Can Go Higher: LGT Bank's Hofer
data.text: Nov.11 -- Stefan Hofer, Asia managing director and chief investment strategist at LGT Bank Ltd., discusses the rally in Japanese stocks, emerging markets and his outlook for the U.S. dollar.
